clinicalAttribute.displayName: Neoplasm American Joint Committee on Cancer Clinical Primary Tumor T Stage
clinicalAttribute.description: Extent of the primary cancer based on evidence obtained from clinical assessment parameters determined prior to treatment.
Disease free status since initial treatment.

clinicalAttribute.displayName: American Joint Committee on Cancer Tumor Stage Code
clinicalAttribute.description: Code of pathological T (primary tumor) to define the size or contiguous extension of the primary tumor (T), using staging criteria from the American Joint Committee on Cancer (AJCC).
